title: Ramp Opens Stablecoin Accounts and Payments to Business Clients
message_html: Ramp Opens Stablecoin Accounts and Payments to Business Clients ...
snippet: Financial operations platform Ramp says it has begun offering customers stablecoin accounts and payments. The new offering, announced Tuesday (July 21), gives businesses a single platform for holding, moving and accounting for fiat and stablecoin funds alike. “Stablecoins have become a normal way fo
